observations: The meta-banner at the top is present and functional, but the blurred/redacted text in the middle of each screenshot (likely privacy masking applied by the test runner) obscures several section headings, making it impossible to fully verify their content from these screenshots.
The 'Before and after RootSpec' section heading appears in a stylized crossed-out font that may be intentional branding but looks potentially broken on first glance.

The hierarchy explorer's L1 level is visually expanded and highlighted in purple while L2–L5 show as collapsed rows — the interactive affordance (arrow indicators) is subtle and may not be immediately obvious to new visitors.

The light-theme screenshot (US-102) renders cleanly with the same layout as dark mode, confirming theme toggle parity, though the wizard's 'Next' button appears slightly desaturated compared to the primary CTA style.
Footer attribution is present and readable at the bottom of all screenshots.
